name: Vorvomon

signature_move.name: Petit Flame
signature_move.description: Spews out a small, high-temperature flame from its mouth.

description: A Digimon made of a solid, hot ore. It has wings on both of its arms and is able to fly for up to a few seconds, but gets tired easily. It is very passionate, so the more excited it gets, the hotter its horns and claws will become. Its Special Move is spewing out a small but high-temperature flame from its mouth ( Petit Flame ).
